## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in to discuss content strategy, programmatic content generation, and Webflow implementation for Ramp and GrowthX collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is progressing, with 29 published articles and 26 more in progress, aiming for \~50 articles live by next week](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [Programmatic content generation for per diem articles is ready to start next week, with potential expansion to other topics (e.g., corporate cards, expense management)](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Glossary pages need improvement and expansion, with a goal to become the "Wikipedia for accounting terms"](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Webflow implementation challenges discussed, exploring Markdown-to-HTML conversion for easier bulk uploads](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Progress

  - [29 articles published, performing well with increasing clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [26 more articles in progress this week](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [15 outlines generated, 11 more to be completed by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [Expecting close to 50 articles live by next week](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)

### Programmatic Content Strategy

  - [Per diem article workflow built and ready to start next week](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Expanding to corporate cards content first, then expense management](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Potential for restaurant recommendation content using Ramp's transaction data](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Discussed creating pages for "best places for business dinners" in various cities](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)

### Glossary Page Improvements

  - [Current glossary pages identified as subpar and in need of improvement](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Goal: Become the "Wikipedia for accounting terms"](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Strategy to avoid cannibalization: use different keyword variations (e.g., "Expense Management definition, example" for glossary)](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Plan to identify missing terms, possibly using widget's casual.app as a reference](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)

### Webflow Implementation and Formatting

  - [Exploring Markdown export options for easier formatting in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Discussed previous programmatic content implementations (e.g., expense categories, mileage reimbursement by state)](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Potential to use Airtable backend for easier content management and updates](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)

### Future Plans

  - [Moving from current CMS to Sanity in December](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [Considering bulk updates for yearly content (e.g., adding "2025" to titles)](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Luke to get specific requirements from Abby for per diem pages and other programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
  - [Bisera to continue with content production, awaiting Abby's review of per diem content](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
  - [Explore Markdown-to-HTML conversion options for easier Webflow uploads](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [Investigate widget's casual.app for comprehensive glossary term list](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [Luke to share Figma file template for programmatic content layout](https://fathom.video/share/kMyo-oqZKUXj31Z-xCUzPNVUsDoLWSVT?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
